title: agrostis holgateana
intro: Agrostis holgateana, also known as Holgate's bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Agrostis, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as bentgrasses. While I couldn't find specific information on its medicinal properties, it is likely that like other Agrostis species, it may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. However, no specific health benefits have been identified for this plant. I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations using Agrostis holgateana.
